channel.title: Argocd on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Argocd on Validated Patterns

item.title: Introducing "Bootstrap" Secrets
item.description: Validated Patterns now includes the idea of "bootstrap" secrets that will be injected directly into your cluster during the secrets loading process.

item.title: Validated Patterns now deploys its own ArgoCD instance
item.description: The 0.0.70 patterns operator now creates and manages a dedicated ArgoCD instance in the vp-gitops namespace instead of relying on the default openshift-gitops instance
